publishedAbstract: - After increasing the size of the `Prometheus PVC`, the change appears successful; however, the filesystem `/prometheus` inside the Prometheus pod still reports the previous capacity.- `PVC` size increases (100Gi to 250Gi) but the `Ceph RBD image` remains unchanged. ~~~ $ oc logs-n openshift-storage csi-rbdplugin-ghi56 | grep resize resizefs_linux.go:74 Device /dev/rbd0 resized successfully resizefs_linux.go:156 Volume /dev/rbd0: device size=107374182400 filesystem size=107374182400\ ~~~
publishedTitle: Increasing Prometheus PVC size but it does not  expand the `/prometheus` Filesystem inside the Prometheus pod in RHOCP
